option.name: originalContent
option.value:
spring.config.activate.on-profile=dev
# Dev Database Override spring.data.mongodb.uri=mongodb://localhost:27017/placement-portal
# Dev Logging logging.level.root=INFO logging.level.com.placementportal=DEBUG
# Dev JWT jwt.expiration=2592000000
# Dev Email (optional - allow empty for local testing) spring.mail.username=${EMAIL_USER:} spring.mail.password=${EMAIL_PASS:}
# Dev Demo Data app.seed-demo-data=true

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
spring.config.activate.on-profile=dev
# Dev Database Override spring.data.mongodb.uri=mongodb://localhost:27017/placement-portal
# Dev Logging logging.level.root=INFO logging.level.com.placementportal=DEBUG
# Dev JWT jwt.expiration=2592000000
# Dev Email - local safe defaults # For local testing you may set EMAIL_USER and EMAIL_PASS in your environment or .env file. # If EMAIL_USER is empty, the app will skip sending real emails in some code paths (see service checks). spring.mail.host=${EMAIL_HOST:smtp.gmail.com} spring.mail.port=${EMAIL_PORT:587} spring.mail.username=${EMAIL_USER:} spring.mail.password=${EMAIL_PASS:} spring.mail.properties.mail.smtp.auth=true spring.mail.properties.mail.smtp.starttls.enable=true spring.mail.properties.mail.smtp.starttls.required=true spring.mail.default-encoding=UTF-8
# Dev Demo Data app.seed-demo-data=true
